hero.headline: The Intelligent Event Platform That Transforms Attendance Into Connections
hero.subheadline: Combine real-time spatial intelligence, AI-powered networking, and advanced lead management to create events that generate measurable business value.
hero.social_proof: Built according to global enterprise standards for high-stakes events

problem.title: The Event Industry Faces Critical Challenges
problem.sub_headline: Traditional methods are no longer sufficient for the demands of the modern, data-driven event landscape.

organizer.title: Blind Spots in Real-Time Operations
organizer.desc: Organizers lack real-time visibility into crowd flow, congestion points, and participant engagement during events.

exhibitor.title: Low-Quality Lead Generation
exhibitor.desc: Traditional badge scanning provides no intelligence about lead quality, relevance, or follow-up potential.

participant.title: Missed Networking Opportunities
participant.desc: Participants attend events but rarely meet the right people or discover relevant sessions in real-time.

f1.title: Live Heatmaps & Crowd Analytics
f1.desc: Monitor participant density, movement patterns, and congestion in real-time. Receive predictive alerts before bottlenecks occur.

f2.title: Vector-Based AI Matchmaking
f2.desc: Intelligent matching using skill embeddings and professional vectors. Connect participants with the right people automatically.

f3.title: Smart Lead Scoring & Retrieval
f3.desc: Exhibitors get instant lead quality scores, voice notes, and CRM-ready exports. Maximize ROI on every interaction.

f4.title: Professional Scanner Support
f4.desc: Direct integration with Zebra, Honeywell, and NFC devices. Process 10,000+ scans per second with edge computing.

f5.title: Actionable Recommendations
f5.desc: AI-driven suggestions for organizers: 'Open Gate 4 now' or 'Move catering to reduce congestion in 15 minutes.'

f6.title: GDPR & SOC2 Compliant
f6.desc: Enterprise-grade security, data sovereignty, privacy controls, and audit trails for regulated industries.

solutions.title: Purpose-Built Solutions for Every Event Format

s1.title: Conferences & Seminars
s1.desc: Manage sessions, speakers, and participant engagement with real-time networking.

s2.title: Trade Shows & Exhibitions
s2.desc: Maximize exhibitor ROI with intelligent lead capture and real-time analytics.

s3.title: Corporate Conventions
s3.desc: Streamline large-scale internal events with spatial intelligence and engagement tracking.

s4.title: Incentive & Networking Events
s4.desc: Create memorable experiences with AI-powered networking and real-time recommendations.

workflow.title: Three Steps to Intelligent Event Management

step1.title: Configure Your Event
step1.desc: Define event structure, participant profiles, exhibitor categories, and success metrics in minutes.

step2.title: Deploy Across Channels
step2.desc: Distribute mobile apps, web interfaces, and hardware integrations. Participants check in seamlessly.

step3.title: Monitor & Optimize
step3.desc: Watch live heatmaps, receive AI recommendations, capture leads, and measure impact as it happens.

pricing.title: Transparent Pricing for Events of Any Size
pricing.sub: Choose the plan that fits your needs. Scale up as you grow.

starter.title: Starter
starter.desc: For small to medium events (up to 1,000 participants)

pricing.trial_note: All plans include 30-day free trial. No credit card required.

integrations.sub: Diwan Event doesn't live in a silo. We integrate with the tools you already use to ensure your data flows where it needs to be, instantly.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.q1: How does the AI networking engine work?
faq.a1: Our engine uses machine learning algorithms to match participant interests and expertise, suggesting the most relevant people and companies to connect with.
faq.a2: Yes, we adhere to the highest data protection and privacy standards, including full compliance with GDPR.
faq.help_text: Our team is here to help you 24/7.

t1.name: Dr. Ahmed Mansour
t1.content: Diwan Event transformed our registration process. What used to take hours now takes minutes. The real-time analytics are a game-changer for our stakeholders.

t2.name: Sarah Williams
t2.role: Head of Events, Global Finance Corp
t2.content: The most reliable attendance system we've ever used. The QR scanning is lightning fast, and the dashboard provides the exact insights we need for ROI reporting.

t3.name: Khalid Al-Rashid
t3.content: Enterprise-grade software with a beautiful user experience. Diwan's support team is world-class, assisting us through every step of our large-scale launch.

cta_final.title: Ready to Transform Your Events?
cta_final.sub: Join hundreds of event organizers who've increased engagement, lead quality, and ROI with Diwan Event.
